component.description: 50-V, Universal 4–20 mA, ±20-mA Current Loop Protector With Input and Output Miswiring Protection

absolute_maximum_ratings.conditions: Transient Junction temperature, max is T(TSD)

electrical_characteristics.parameter: Sum of Leakage Current from IN and OUT pins to GND
Sum of Leakage Current from IN and OUT pins to GND

electrical_characteristics.conditions: V(IN)-V(OUT) = ±1 V, -Vs connected to negative supply

electrical_characteristics.parameter: Fast-trip current limit (MODE = Floating or 180 kΩ)
electrical_characteristics.conditions: MODE = Floating or 180 kΩ to GND

electrical_characteristics.parameter: IN to OUT total ON resistance
Current sourced from +Vs supply to GND in normal operation
Current sinked by -Vs supply from GND

pin_definitions.description: Reference ground for all internal voltages. Connect to GND of the ±Vs supply.
MODE selection pin for overload response. Sets current limit to IOL, 2 × IOL, or 2 × IOL with extended tOL expiry time.
Negative supply for dual supply configurations. Connect to GND when used in a single supply configuration.
Positive supply for powering the device
For the TPS26611, TPS26612, and TPS26614: Enable control. Pull EN low to turn off the device.
For the TPS26610 and TPS26613: Supply sensing input for transition to loop power mode.
Signal good indicator pin. Low indicates signal is good to read.

logical_pins.name: GND
logical_pins.description: Reference ground for all internal voltages. Connect to GND of the ±Vs supply.

logical_pins.name: MODE
logical_pins.description: Mode selection pin for overload response. Sets current limit to IOL, 2 × IOL, or 2 × IOL with extended IOL expiry time.

logical_pins.name: -Vs
logical_pins.description: Negative supply for dual supply configurations. Connect to GND when used in a single supply configuration.

logical_pins.name: +Vs
logical_pins.description: Positive supply for powering the device

logical_pins.name: EN
logical_pins.description: Enable control. Pull EN low to turn off the device. EN has internal an pullup and it can be left floating to enable the device.

logical_pins.name: VSNS
logical_pins.description: Supply sensing input for transition to loop power mode. If not used, this pin can be left open or floating.

logical_pins.name: SGOOD
logical_pins.description: Signal good indicator pin. Whenever the device is within normal operating condition, SGOOD shows low indicating signal is good to read.

1.name: GND
1.description: Reference ground for all internal voltages. Connect to GND of the ±Vs supply.

2.name: MODE
2.description: Mode selection pin for overload response. Sets current limit to IOL, 2 × IOL, or 2 × IOL with extended IOL expiry time.

3.name: -Vs
3.description: Negative supply for dual supply configurations. Connect to GND when used in a single supply configuration.

6.name: +Vs
6.description: Positive supply for powering the device

7.name: EN
7.description: Enable control. Pull EN low to turn off the device. EN has internal an pullup and it can be left floating to enable the device. (also: VSNS — Supply sensing input for transition to loop power mode. If not used, this pin can be left open or floating.)

8.name: SGOOD
8.description: Signal good indicator pin. Whenever the device is within normal operating condition, SGOOD shows low indicating signal is good to read.
